plugins.name: anamnese
plugins.description: Cloud-persistent personal memory and productivity for AI. Memories, tasks, goals, and notes -- synced across all your AI apps (Claude, ChatGPT, Claude Code, Cursor) and devices.

plugins.name: anamnese-personal-assistant
plugins.description: AI-powered personal life assistant. Goal planning, financial awareness, wellness tracking, and life management -- backed by persistent cloud memory.

plugins.name: anamnese-productivity
plugins.description: Productivity system for knowledge workers. Daily planning, career growth, knowledge management, and project tracking -- backed by persistent cloud memory.

plugins.name: self-improvement
plugins.description: AI self-learning through corrections. The AI captures mistakes, adapts behavior from past corrections, and periodically consolidates learnings -- backed by persistent cloud memory.
